title: Information gathering
doc_html:
§3275.4. Information gathering

            An energy utility shall report to the commission annually, by January fifteenth, whether it does or does not offer property owners with multiple meters the option to request an annual consumption report.

            Act 2025, No. 311, §1, eff. June 24, 2025.
doc_text:
§3275.4.  Information gathering
An energy utility shall report to the commission annually, by January fifteenth,
whether it does or does not offer property owners with multiple meters the option to request
an annual consumption report.
Act 2025, No. 311, §1, eff. June 24, 2025.
